title: This 26 y/o 10x'd Revenue Doing the Opposite of Every AI Startup | Paraform, John Kim
summary: John Kim's Paraform platform paid over 50 million dollars to human recruiters while competitors pursued full AI automation, resulting in a 10x revenue increase. The company argues that increasing email volume to find hires demonstrates hiring is becoming noisier despite AI, and that human judgment remains the true competitive advantage in recruitment.
